customlist.name: Companion Prompt Domain
customlist.aidescription: Crafted Intelligence domain that a companion prompt belongs to. Maps to a toolset package. Used for domain tab filtering in the Crafted Companion Library SPA and for grouping prompts by functional area.

customvalue.aidescription: Barrel aging, cooperage, inventory, cost tracing, valuation, and location tracking. Toolset: barrel-intelligence. Primary edition: Distillery (some cross-edition).
Lot-level cost tracing, profitability analysis, yield analysis, GL detail, sales trail, and cost variance. Toolset: lot-profitability. Primary edition: Distillery.
Inventory snapshots, aging, trends, alerts, BOM costing, item intelligence, and supply chain analysis. Toolset: inventory-supply. Edition: Cross-edition.
Regulatory compliance readiness, filing status, audit trails, field change audits, and data quality checks. Toolset: compliance-audit. Edition: Cross-edition.
MRP supply/demand analysis, action messages, setup audits, shelf life MRP, and supply plan analysis. Toolset: mrp-intelligence. Edition: Cross-edition.
Batch composition, lineage tracing, and genealogy analysis for blended products. Toolset: batch-genealogy. Primary edition: Winery.
